Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corpration is present. Represented by Mary Gillestia.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Marino is present.
Attorney Ron Lunski representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Conroy litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Aug -13-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
